summary: Governance contract for gongvue service onboarding, extension boundaries, and deterministic validation.
purpose: Maintain the central governance package for gongvue while keeping runtime implementation and deployment automation outside ai-governance.

approval_boundary: high plus human gate for plugin or sidecar boundary expansion
forbidden_actions: Gongvue runtime code changes in ai-governance

start_conditions: Create MCP expansion requests under traces/governance/mcp-request-*.json when needed.
steady_state: Keep service registration, policy profile, allowlist, and contract bundle aligned.
Treat plugin and sidecar extensions as contract-only boundaries.
failure_response: Stop rollout on hash mismatch and regenerate evidence.
Rollback request status to requested when allowlist and request drift.
Escalate extension boundary issues to high-tier review.
rollback_reference: Revert the latest contract-only change set.
Re-run validation and determinism gates before reopening.

failure_modes: Policy bypass at the plugin or sidecar boundary.
Sensitive customer data leaking into evidence artifacts.
Registry drift between central contracts and extension requests.
Customer extension code causing policy violations.
mandatory_controls: High-tier human gate for extension boundary changes.
Central validate_all gate as the default contract check.

retention_policy: Keep only minimal core traces in-repo.
Move long-lived operating logs to obsidian-mcp after validation.
Create all temporary artifacts only under traces/.

conditions: Preserve repo-relative evidence paths and sha256 references.

access_controls: No raw customer payloads in evidence summaries.

extension_baseline: Plugin plus sidecar is the first-stage extension model.
SDK distribution is deferred to L2 or later.
Central governance owns policy, validation, and audit only.
permissions_scope: No runtime code execution in the governance core.

error_budget: Spend budget on deterministic validation failures.
Freeze high-risk changes until the budget recovers.

change_log.change: Collapsed gongvue governance docs into a single JSON contract bundle.
Added gongvue onboarding contract package and linked it to the central registries.
